title: Galoz Role-Based Model Experiment 2 Plan
objective: Force each model to produce a meaningfully different role/style so performance comparison is sharper than Experiment 1.
rules: Do not delete or merge existing agents
Each model keeps a distinct role
All HTML must remain full Hebrew RTL WordPress-ready with real images and no scripts

gpt-5.5-operational-balanced.role: Operational balanced template: safest default for employees, clean structure, simple WordPress paste, balanced SEO/CRO.

opus-4.7-conversion-copy.role: High-conversion copy and narrative: stronger persuasive copy, trust, authority, CTAs, FAQ depth, but still WordPress-safe.

gemini-3.1-seo-ia.role: SEO and information architecture: stronger headings, semantic clusters, internal links, FAQ/snippet readiness, source traceability.

kimi-k2.6-workflow-technical.role: Technical workflow and engineering: stronger n8n JSON/prompt operational detail, variable mapping, QA steps, technical accuracy.

glm-5.1-wordpress-qa.role: WordPress-safe QA focus: minimal fragile constructs, mobile/RTL/inline CSS safety, acceptance checklist, failure prevention.
